title: Junior Product Designer - Jewellery
description:
As a Junior Product Designer at Ask & Embla, you will support the design and development of innovative, trend-relevant jewelry that aligns with the brand’s vision and customer identity. You will assist in research, conceptualization, and technical design work while learning to translate creative direction into production-ready deliverables. This role is ideal for someone with foundational jewelry design skills who is eager to grow into a full-fledged designer role.

What You'll Do

Design Research & Concept Development

  • Assist with researching trends, customer preferences, materials, and techniques across industries to inform design direction.
  • Contribute to the development of mood boards, design decks, and seasonal concept presentations.
  • Support the Creative Director and Product Design team by sketching and proposing jewelry concepts aligned with the brand’s vision and assortment plan.

Technical Design & CAD Support

  • Learn and apply CAD tools (e.g. Rhino, ZBrush) to translate sketches into 3D models and technical drawings.
  • Assist in preparing tech packs and design specifications for sampling and production.
  • Provide support in the creation of prototypes, including working with 3D printing processes.

Collaboration & Iteration

  • Work closely with the Product Design and Product Development team to refine designs during sampling stages.
  • Incorporate feedback into revisions of sketches, 3D models, and technical documentation.
  • Participate in cross-functional meetings, offering input from a design perspective.

Project Support & Administration

  • Help maintain organized design records, references, and material libraries.
  • Assist in compiling decks, reports, and design documentation for internal use.
  • Support the design team in day-to-day tasks to ensure smooth workflow and timely delivery.

Who You Are

  • A graduate of a product design or industrial design course, and experience in a product design or jewelry design role, is preferred.
  • Foundational knowledge of jewelry design principles, materials, and manufacturing processes.
  • Familiarity with jewelry CAD software and 3D prototyping - Rhino and ZBrush preferred.
  • Strong sketching and visualization skills, with attention to detail and creativity.
  • Ability to manage multiple tasks under deadlines while maintaining design quality.
  • A collaborative mindset with a passion for learning and growing in jewelry design.

About Ask & Embla

Who We Are:

Ask & Embla is a rapidly growing Alternative Body Jewelry brand based in Singapore with a collective following of more than 500,000 across our social media channels. As an E-commerce brand, we ship internationally to a diverse range of customers and we are proud to be one of the leading brands worldwide in the alternative jewelry space.

At Ask & Embla, we’re passionate about creating a company that brings out the best in everyone and where individuals love to work and grow as a team. That means constantly learning and building new things, being flexible about how and where we work, and empowering each other to do the proudest work of our lives.

Ask & Embla, led by an ex-Googler and ex-Amazonian, has dozens of employees across multiple countries. We are building the foundation to expand several business verticals beyond e-commerce, while supporting existing business functions for fulfilling thousands of orders each month.

Ready to Join Us?

If you're a results-oriented professional who thrives in a fast-paced environment, we encourage you to apply!

Learn More about Ask & Embla:

Website - https://askandembla.net/

Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/askemblastore/

Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/AskEmblastore/

Pinterest - https://www.pinterest.com/askemblastore/

TikTok - https://www.tiktok.com/@askandembla_official

Why Work With Us?

At Ask & Embla we learn and build fast together, sharing the purpose and passion of creating not just beautiful, expressive and sustainably-made jewelry, but a community that celebrates the misfits, the believers, the round pegs in square holes and everyone in between. Everyone deserves to own who they are; we create the jewelry so they can do it with pride.

Job Details

Job Type: Full-time Pay: Ranging from SGD 2,600 - 3,200 per month

Benefits:

  • Hybrid setup
  • Health insurance
  • Dental insurance
  • Paid time-off
  • Employee discounts
  • Professional development opportunities

Schedule:

  • Day shift

Location:

  • Singapore

postedCompany.description:
Ask & Embla is a rapidly growing jewelry brand born from alternative subcultures shaped by punk, goth, and music movements. We're based in Singapore, with a collective following of more than 850,000 across our social media channels. Our growth continues with the launch of Ambi, our piercing-focused jewelry brand, which carries the same spirit of self-expression as Ask & Embla.

As e-commerce brands, we ship internationally to a diverse customer base, and we are proud to be one of the leading brands worldwide in the alternative jewelry space. We’re passionate about creating a company that brings out the best in everyone, where individuals love to work and grow as a team. That means constantly learning, building new things, staying flexible about how and where we work, and empowering each other to do the proudest work of our lives.

Ask & Embla and Ambi are led by an ex-Googler and ex-Amazonian, supported by dozens of team members across multiple countries. We’re building the foundation to expand into several business verticals beyond e-commerce, while continuing our operations to fulfil thousands of orders each month.
